prompt: The interior corridor of a futuristic space station in zero gravity. A cylindrical tunnel with smooth white paneling and circular structural rings. Glowing cyan-blue strip lights run along the edges where walls meet ceiling and floor. Transparent holographic display panels embedded in the walls show scrolling data and star maps. A pen and crumpled paper float weightlessly in the air. Through a large observation window on the left, the curved edge of Earth is visible against the black void of space with a thin blue atmospheric line. Behind the viewer, the corridor bends toward a docking module with airlock hatches and yellow warning markings. To the right, a sealed bulkhead door with a circular porthole leads to a crew quarters module. Ahead, the corridor extends into a junction where branching tunnels connect to the command bridge and the research lab. First-person viewer. First-person perspective, floating at corridor center height, looking forward down the cylindrical corridor. No character body visible. Zero-gravity viewpoint.

scene_adherence.visible_part: The interior corridor of a futuristic space station is in zero gravity. It is a cylindrical tunnel with smooth white paneling and circular structural rings. Glowing cyan-blue strip lights run along the edges where walls meet ceiling and floor. Transparent holographic display panels embedded in the walls show scrolling data and star maps. A pen and crumpled paper float weightlessly in the air. Through a large observation window on the left, the curved edge of Earth is visible against the black void of space with a thin blue atmospheric line.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Behind the viewer, the corridor bends toward a docking module with airlock hatches and yellow warning markings. To the right, a sealed bulkhead door with a circular porthole leads to a crew quarters module. Ahead, the corridor extends into a junction where branching tunnels connect to the command bridge and the research lab.
